queries.question: Empirical analysis of how extended loan duration in months influences credit risk drivers and reduces default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default probability associated with the absence of a checking account and their contribution to credit risk mitigation.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers related to critical credit history or existing credits and their empirical impact on lowering default likelihood.
